Potions and Scrolls — Female Human Fighter
Strength: 9 (-1) Dexterity: 12 (+1) Constitution: 8 (-1) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 12 (+1) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Faction: The Exchange Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: Shelyn (NG)
Experience: 2/3 (PSOP) Level: 1 Speed/Run: 20/80 Light/Med/Max Load: 30/60/90
Ability Notes:
Armor Speed Adjustment: -10
Human Ability Adjustment: +2 any
Features/Skills
Feat Count: Fighter: 1; General: 2
Feats: Skill Focus (Craft (Weapons)); Skill Focus (Knowledge (Engineering)); Throw Anything Human Features: Bonus Feat; Human Ability Adjustment; Skilled Fighter Features: Armor Proficiency (Heavy); Shield Proficiency; Tower Shield Proficiency; Weapon Proficiency (Martial)

Craft (Weapons): (int) 1 (+8) Perception: (wis;cc) 1 (+2)
Knowledge (Engineering): (int) 1 (+8) Profession (Tanner): (wis) 1 (+5)
Languages: Common; Dwarven

Armor Skill Check Penalty: -5 Dex- and Str-based skills

Dexterity Reflex Adjustment: +1
Wisdom Will Adjustment: +1
Magic
Potions/Oils:
Cure Light Wounds Potion (Adept1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)

Cure Light Wounds Potion (R2 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+4 HP (DC 13 Will half)

Owl's Wisdom Potion (D2 Tran): Touched gains +4 Wisdom for 3 min
